name: Padtec Holding S.A.
summary: Padtec Holding S.A., is No longer investing. The firm seeks to invest in education technology and online education services, technology applied to healthcare with a focus on health services and healthcare, telecommunications, security, SaaS, e-commerce, contents, media, communications, cloud computing, software, mobile solutions and related technology sectors. It prefers to invest in companies based in Brazil. The firm seeks to invest between R$2 million ($0.89 million) and R$10 million ($4.43 million) in equity in companies with sales values between R$10 million ($4.93 million) and R$150 million ($73.97 million). The firm seeks to acquire both minority and majority stakes going from 10 per cent to 97 per cent. The firm prefers to take a seat on the board of directors of its portfolio companies. It makes balance sheet investments. Padtec Holding S.A. was founded in 1998 and is based in Sao Paulo, Brazil.
